home.name: Jenny
home.bio: After 15 years of shaping clinical innovation from a strategic business perspective, I have closed the loop by building the solutions I once envisioned. As a full-stack developer, I translate stakeholder needs into end-to-end products, ensuring technical execution is always rooted in real-world impact.
home.techSubtitle: Tools and technologies I work with
home.softTitle: What I Bring to the Table

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.subtitle: what I build, the tech I use, and the credentials behind it.
portfolio.certCodeboxxServices: End-to-end full stack development: JavaScript, React, Node.js, Java, Spring Boot, databases, and DevOps.
portfolio.project1Desc: Progressive series building a full company ecosystem — static website, quote calculator, styling & API integration, three iterations of a Node.js REST API, and a MERN admin app with session-based authentication.
portfolio.project2Desc: Full-stack social blog platform with auth, posts, comments, admin dashboard, pagination, and skeleton loaders. Followed by a performance audit covering Lighthouse, SEO, accessibility, and a Selenium test suite.
portfolio.project3Desc: Java OOP system modeling a BankAccount class hierarchy using inheritance, polymorphism, and encapsulation.
portfolio.project4Desc: Java backend with Spring Boot REST API, Thymeleaf back-office CRUD, JPA/Hibernate persistence, native SQL queries, and JUnit test coverage.
portfolio.project5Desc: React Native Expo app with customer and courier roles, nested navigation, order placement, delivery status flow, and account settings.
portfolio.project6Desc: React + Vite portfolio deployed on GitHub Pages via CI/CD. Includes contact form via Supabase, admin back-office, Lighthouse audits, and Selenium tests.
portfolio.project7Desc: Served as Product Owner for a UNDP-backed telehealth platform delivering accessible healthcare in conflict-affected communities across Libya, Jordan, and Tunisia. Defined user stories and acceptance criteria, ran Agile sprint ceremonies, managed the product backlog, and coordinated with global partners including Harvard Innovation Labs, MIT Legatum Center, and local ministries of health. The platform powered Libya's COVID-19 triage centre, reaching 1.8M+ beneficiaries and 3.2M people via health education content.
portfolio.project8Desc: Contributed as Full Stack Developer and lead QA on WoundFlow, an evidence-based wound care training platform for healthcare professionals built for S2Medical AB. Developed front-end features in React/TypeScript and built a comprehensive QA test suite covering clinical case flows, adaptive learning paths, REST API endpoints, and user authentication. Ensured reliability of specialist-reviewed content delivery and certification workflows across clinical settings.
portfolio.edu1Desc: Intensive full-stack bootcamp covering React, Node.js, Java, Spring Boot, MongoDB, MySQL, Supabase, CI/CD, and agile development practices.
